title: Add pulses/tasks while offline
excerpt: It would be great if pulses/tasks input while offline were saved locally and then added upon reconnecting to the internet (analogous to when you send an email while offline).

posts.author: babar222 (Josh Tarasoff)
posts.cookedHtml: It would be great if pulses/tasks input while offline were saved locally and then added upon reconnecting to the internet (analogous to when you send an email while offline).
